nasb.text: The Ammonites also gave tribute to Uzziah, and his fame extended to the border of Egypt, for he became very strong.

esv.text: The Ammonites paid tribute to Uzziah, and his fame spread even to the border of Egypt, for he became very strong.

cnv.text: 亞捫人給烏西雅進貢，他的名聲傳到埃及的邊境，因為他極其強盛。

ccb.text: 亚扪人向他进贡，乌西雅的名声传到埃及，因他极其强大。
